rationale.fidelity: Maintains the equivalent production-planning feasible set and cost objective and correctly treats runtime as a computational outcome.
rationale.managerial_framing: Explains several valid deadline, cadence, scale, and incumbent pathways while refusing the direct profit conversion; the specific planner and trigger remain implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Bounds the result as a computational finding and makes no unsupported novelty claim; scholarly positioning is not requested.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Uses the supplied benchmark fact narrowly and clearly marks the profit link as unsupported.
rationale.overall: A highly faithful and disciplined computational framing with only a minor managerial-specificity deduction.
